  "findings": [
    "Control wiring routed in the same raceway as VFD power conductors, causing electromagnetic interference (EMI) and violating manufacturer installation requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate and reroute the control wiring into a separate, dedicated conduit or use shielded cabling in accordance with manufacturer specifications and NEC separation rules."
  ],
  "rationale": "VFD manufacturer manuals strictly prohibit routing sensitive control/signal wiring in the same raceway as noisy output power conductors to prevent induced noise, signal corruption, and erratic motor behavior. NEC 300.3(C) and NEC 430 rules require proper separation of conductors of different systems unless specifically permitted and insulated for the maximum voltage, but VFD noise mitigation specifically mandates physical isolation.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 300.3(C)",
    "NEC 430",
    "VFD Manufacturer Installation Manuals (Noise Mitigation/Wiring Separation)"
  ]
}
